svg.title: Bayt al-Hikma MVP — ERD (Final)
svg.desc: Final entity-relationship diagram for the slim MVP after removing the Dialect entity. Ten tables: 4 accounts (User, TeacherProfile, StudentProfile, ParentProfile) and 6 curriculum (Level, Category, Course, Lesson, Enrollment, LessonProgress).
svg.text: 10 tables · MSA only · placement & open-course rules baked in
